nodes.title: Wan 2.2 Img2Vid - Long Video Length Generation (For Loop Structure) (Advanced) (Ver. 20250902)

widgets_values: Cinematic scenes, high quality photography, photorealistic
色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

The demon king and demon queen stand entwined in a passionate embrace beneath the crumbling arches of an ancient, ruined temple, its marble columns rising like broken monuments against a stormy sky. The ground around them is cracked and seething with molten lava, glowing embers flickering between jagged rocks. He holds her tightly, his armored arms wrapped around her waist, while she clings to him, her fiery red hair flowing like flames in the wind. Their lips meet in a deep, soulful kiss as the air hums with energy, and the first tremors begin to shake the earth beneath their feet.

Use "Image2Video Model"

Load Diffusion Model connect to TorchCompileModel

Or for Low VRAM ====> GGUF

Unet Loader (GGUF) + WanVideoBlockSwap
 connect to TorchCompileModel.

Use "Image2Video Model"

Load Diffusion Model connect to TorchCompileModel

Or for Low VRAM ====> GGUF

Unet Loader (GGUF) + WanVideoBlockSwap
 connect to TorchCompileModel.

Travel Prompt Should be based on Number Of Extend.

One row = One Prompt

Press Enter to write another line = Text Prompt for another Video Extend.

E.g: 

726 Total Frames , FPS 25
= 29 Seconds video

If we use 121 frames for each sampling
= 6 video sampling times

No. 1 >>> Sampling - Part 1

No. 2-6 >>>> In Video Extend Loop

<<< For Sampling - Part 1 , Text prompt only.  

Extend Video Text prompts , use "Travel Prompt for Extend Video"

As their kiss deepens, the temple starts to collapse—rocks crumble from the ceiling, pillars crack and fall, and the ground beneath them heaves violently. The demon king pulls the queen closer, shielding her with his body as debris rains down around them. Flames erupt from fissures in the stone, illuminating their faces with an orange glow. Their eyes lock for a brief moment, filled with love and defiance, before the world begins to tear apart around them—the very fabric of reality unraveling in this sacred, cursed place.
With a final, desperate embrace, the demon king lifts the queen into his arms as the ground splits open beneath them. They tumble together into the chasm, falling through a vortex of fire and smoke, their bodies silhouetted against the inferno. The camera follows their descent in slow motion, capturing the intensity of their grip and the way their clothes billow like wings in the chaos. The ruins above vanish behind them, replaced by swirling darkness and the roar of hellish winds. 
They plummet deeper into the underworld, the camera tracking their fall through a tunnel of molten rock and floating ash. Lava rivers surge below, casting an eerie red light that reflects off their armor and skin. The demon king shields the queen from flying debris, his expression fierce yet tender. Sparks fly around them like stars in a dying universe, and the sound of cracking stone and distant roars echoes through the abyss, emphasizing the scale of their plunge into the depths. 
As they descend further, the camera swirls around them, showing the full horror and beauty of the underground realm—a landscape of burning rivers, floating boulders, and towering volcanic spires. The demon queen’s dress glows faintly with inner fire, and the demon king’s horns blaze with crimson light. Their bodies continue to fall in perfect harmony, still locked in an unbreakable embrace, as if gravity itself cannot separate them. The world around them pulses with dark magic, and the air thrums with the power of creation and destruction.
Finally, they crash into a vast cavern below, landing softly on a bed of cooled lava rock, surrounded by geysers of flame and drifting embers. The camera lingers on them as they lie together, breathing heavily, still holding each other tightly. The demon king gently strokes her hair, and she rests her head on his chest, both of them untouched by the chaos. The scene fades slowly into a wide shot of the infernal landscape—endless fire, jagged stone, and a sky painted in blood-red hues—as the couple remains at the center, a beacon of love in the heart of hell.
